title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at HDFC Securities

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at HDFC Securities
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, HDFC Securities in Nagpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About HDFC Securities:
HDFC Securities is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HDFC Securities!
